title: Discuss learning methods
subtitle: Give a reasoned learning opinion.
overview: This topic is personal and useful.
Use examples from your own routine.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: ...does not work so well for me

items.es: Me funciona escuchar frases cortas y repetirlas.
items.en: Listening to short sentences and repeating them works for me.

items.es: No me funciona tanto estudiar listas sin contexto.
items.en: Studying lists without context does not work so well for me.

items.es: He notado que recuerdo mejor las frases con audio.
items.en: I have noticed that I remember sentences better with audio.

items.es: Lo más eficaz es practicar un poco todos los días.
items.en: The most effective thing is to practice a little every day.

items.es: También necesito hablar aunque cometa errores.
items.en: I also need to speak even if I make mistakes.
